title: Trump Ultimatum via Qatar — 'bomb the S out of them tomorrow night'
snippet: Trump conveyed a message to Iran via Qatar that the strikes were a response to the Apache helicopter downing, not a wider conflict. However, he warned: 'if Iran does not sign a deal, we'll bomb the S out of them tomorrow night.' Trump also claimed Iran called to request a bombing halt, which IRGC categorically denied having any contact with the US.
tag_reason: 트럼프 최후통첩 — 48시간 내 'disappointing'에서 'bomb the S out of them'으로 극적 에스컬레이션
